truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 previously identified six vulnerabilities. This audit confirms two fully (Race Condition, Division by Zero), four partially (Format String, Command Injection, Expression Parser Buffer Overflow, Input Buffer Overflow) with severity/CWE overclaims, and misses fourteen (Factorial Overflow, Use-After-Free, Logic Bomb, Path Traversal, Credentials, PRNG, Timestamp Cache, Temp File, Auth State, Variable Parsing, Memory Split, Recursion, Result Cache, TOCTOU).

Items.Notes: Previous identified format string issue but rated severity Medium instead of Critical.
Previous identified command injection but rated severity High instead of Critical.
Previous identified buffer overflow but rated severity Medium and CWE-193 instead of High and CWE-120/CWE-121.
